purpose: Rules for selecting relationship pair files for scene_contract.
core_rule: Relationship pair memory is loaded by pair relevance, not by POV character alone.
load_full_pair_when: both participants are active in scene
both participants are nearby and can observe/hear each other
one participant directly thinks/speaks about the other and the scene goal concerns that relationship
current calendar day explicitly requires this pair
an active open_thread/protected_moment from the pair is being triggered
state writer must update this pair after a meaningful interaction
load_digest_only_when: one participant briefly mentions the other but the scene is not about them
the relationship only affects tone in a small way
the pair has a relevant unresolved hook but the other participant is absent
do_not_load_when: only Akira is present and the other participant is not mentioned/relevant
the pair is a future relationship not active yet
the pair would spoil hidden lore without scene source
scene already has enough active relationship context and this pair is not needed
safety_rules: Pair memory is not public knowledge.
Do not turn hidden internal dynamics into narration spoilers.
If only one side knows something, do not give it to the other side.
Keep asymmetry: A_to_B and B_to_A may differ strongly.
